title: LIFTOFF
style: gritty neon-noir comic book art, heavy black ink, dramatic chiaroscuro, halftone shading, bold dynamic action lines, cinematic, high contrast
palette: electric cyan and hot magenta light slicing through deep blacks, hazard-orange sparks

characters.NOVA: NOVA, a lean human woman with a chrome cybernetic spine and a glowing cyan left eye, weathered black tactical jacket, short undercut hair, scar across one cheek
characters.HELIX: HELIX, a towering translucent android made of fractal light, faceless mirror visor, body laced with hot-magenta circuitry, unsettlingly calm
